description: 6-layer architecture trace of reason template/renderer path. Identifies which layers are safe to repair and which are forbidden.

layer1_scoringPath.name: Scoring Path
layer1_scoringPath.description: Computes alphaScore, bucket, scoreSnapshot from raw price/chip/revenue data. FORBIDDEN to modify.
layer1_scoringPath.modificationForbiddenReason: Scoring formula change would violate P28B invariance constraint. P28A confirmed scoring is CORRECT.

layer2_snapshotBuildPath.name: Snapshot Build Path
layer2_snapshotBuildPath.description: Assembles ActiveScoringSnapshot from scoring results + factor data. Stores factorSnapshot, reasonSnapshot, scoreSnapshot. FORBIDDEN to modify alphaScore/bucket computation.
outputFields: reasonSnapshot (may be single-token for pre-P26A snapshots)
layer2_snapshotBuildPath.modificationForbiddenReason: alphaScore/bucket calculation is forbidden. However, additive non-scoring fields (e.g., new reason output fields) could be considered in P28C.

layer3_factorSnapshotPath.name: Factor Snapshot Path
layer3_factorSnapshotPath.description: Builds and enriches factorSnapshot evidence from corpus rows. Read-only in P28B context.

identifiedGaps.description: WalkthroughCaseInput does not carry scoreSnapshot from activeScoringSnapshot
identifiedGaps.fixType: additive field passthrough — does not change scoring

identifiedGaps.description: enrichReasonFromExistingFactors derives direction label from scoreSnapshot.technicalScore which is 0 when not passed through
identifiedGaps.impact: Cases with MA 多頭排列 get label '技術面偏空' instead of '技術面偏多'
identifiedGaps.fixType: fallback direction inference from factorSnapshot MA trend text — renderer-only change

layer3_factorSnapshotPath.safeToModify: PARTIAL — additive enrichment functions only, no scoring change

layer4_reasonSnapshotSerializationPath.name: Reason Snapshot Serialization Path
layer4_reasonSnapshotSerializationPath.description: The corpus stores reasonSnapshot as flat string. For pre-P26A rows, this is a single generic token (e.g. '技術偏多'). The corpus is FROZEN — no writes allowed.
storedFields: activeScoringSnapshot.scoreSnapshot (has actual scores in corpus, but NOT passed to WalkthroughCaseInput)

identifiedGaps.description: activeScoringSnapshot.scoreSnapshot is in the corpus but NOT extracted by P26ACorpusRowAdapter
identifiedGaps.impact: Renderer cannot use actual technicalScore/chipScore for direction labels
identifiedGaps.fixType: pass scoreSnapshot through adapter → WalkthroughCaseInput → minimalSnapshot

layer4_reasonSnapshotSerializationPath.modificationForbiddenReason: Corpus files are FROZEN. No writes allowed. Read-only access only.

layer5_readTimeRendererPath.name: Read-Time Renderer Path
layer5_readTimeRendererPath.description: At read/display time, P26ACorpusReasonRenderer enriches single-token reasonSnapshot using factorSnapshot. This is the PRIMARY repair target.

currentOutcomes.ENRICHED: Single-token + factorSnapshot present → replaces with multi-factor text

identifiedGaps.description: renderReasonFromCorpusSnapshot relies on enrichReasonFromExistingFactors which uses scoreSnapshot.technicalScore=0 → wrong direction labels
identifiedGaps.impact: ENRICHED outcome fires but label is inverted (偏空 instead of 偏多)
identifiedGaps.fixType: renderer-only — infer direction from MA trend string in factorSnapshot

identifiedGaps.description: No template for mixed-signal case (MA 空頭排列 + MACD 多方動能)
identifiedGaps.impact: Renderer produces fragmented output without unified summary for 00891 cases
identifiedGaps.fixType: add mixed-signal template branch in renderer

identifiedGaps.description: No explicit NO_TRIGGERED_FACTOR explanation template in renderer
identifiedGaps.impact: When factorSnapshotCount=10 but no factors met threshold, renderer should explain context neutrally
identifiedGaps.fixType: add NO_TRIGGERED_FACTOR context note in renderer output

modificationConstraints: Must not add new factors not in ALLOWED_FACTOR_SET
Must remain deterministic (same input → same output)
Must not write to DB or corpus

layer6_walkthroughDisplayPath.name: Walkthrough / Display Path
layer6_walkthroughDisplayPath.description: P5WalkthroughReviewUtils constructs minimalSnapshot for renderer and outputs renderedReason to UI. This is where the scoreSnapshot zeros bug originates.
outputFields: renderedReason (display only — NOT used for scoring)

identifiedGaps.description: minimalSnapshot.scoreSnapshot = { technicalScore: 0, chipScore: 0, momentumScore: 0, revenueScore: 0 } — always zero, never populated from corpus activeScoringSnapshot.scoreSnapshot
identifiedGaps.impact: enrichReasonFromExistingFactors gets wrong scores → wrong direction labels in enriched output
identifiedGaps.fixType: pass scoreSnapshot from WalkthroughCaseInput.scoreSnapshot (new optional field) into minimalSnapshot

identifiedGaps.description: WalkthroughCaseInput type does not declare scoreSnapshot field
identifiedGaps.impact: Cannot pass scoreSnapshot from corpus adapter to renderer without type change
identifiedGaps.fixType: additive optional field — no breaking change

modificationConstraints: Only add optional additive fields to WalkthroughCaseInput
Do not change existing scoring fields
Do not add buy/sell/ROI output fields

safeEntryPoints.change: Add optional scoreSnapshot to WalkthroughCaseInput interface; use it in minimalSnapshot construction
safeEntryPoints.impact: Renderer gets correct technicalScore/chipScore → correct direction labels
Actual corpus scores available to renderer

safeEntryPoints.change: Add inferDirectionFromFactorSnapshot() helper — fallback when scoreSnapshot.technicalScore=0
safeEntryPoints.impact: Correct direction label even without scoreSnapshot passthrough

safeEntryPoints.change: Add mixed-signal template and NO_TRIGGERED_FACTOR context note
safeEntryPoints.impact: 9 cases render with proper multi-factor output and context
